title: Example Blog Post
description: This is an example blog post to demonstrate the file structure for adding new posts to your website.
content:
This is an example blog post that demonstrates how to add new content to your website. When you use the admin panel to create a new post, it will generate a JSON file like this one that you can save in the src/data/posts/ directory.

To add this post to your website:

1. Copy the JSON content from the admin panel
2. Create a new file in src/data/posts/ with the filename: {timestamp}.json
3. Paste the JSON content into the file
4. Import and add the post to your projects array in the main pages

This system allows you to easily add new content without needing a database, making it perfect for a simple personal website.
